resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def isFascinating(self, n: int) -> bool:
        concatenated = str(n) + str(2*n) + str(3*n)
        return len(concatenated) == 9 and set(concatenated) == set('123456789')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution efficiently checks if the concatenated number contains all digits from 1 to 9 exactly once by converting the numbers to strings, concatenating them, and then checking if the length of the resulting string is 9 and if its set of characters is equal to the set of characters '123456789'.
